features: ✨ SPARKLING GOLD & SILVER WRAP – Includes 2 gold and 2 silver holographic rolls for an eye-catching, festive finish to your gifts.

🎁 PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASION – Popular for Christmas, birthdays, weddings, and special celebrations.

🧻 DURABLE 70GSM PAPER – Strong yet easy to fold and cut, with a dazzling holographic one-sided print.
🛍️ GREAT VALUE MULTIPACK – 4-roll set combines style and quantity for all-year-round gifting and crafting.
